Author: Market Assistant Dev
Name: Market Master Pro
Punchline: Manual market intelligence and arbitrage scanner for FFXIV.
Description: Analyzes market opportunities with Universalis data, watchlists, velocity filters, and manual undercut helpers. All actions are manual. Now includes real-time undercut notifications.
Changelog:
v1.1.28: Added Buy/Sell History tab with persistent storage and manual entry. Track your market transactions directly in the plugin.
v1.1.27: Added dynamic content-aware table autosizing for Search Results, Watchlist, and Opportunities item columns. Fixed scanner progress reporting to update consistently through batch fetch/filter/eval phases. Improved undercut chat alerts with stronger highlighted formatting.
